engineGuide.h2: Nissan Primera Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Nissan Primera across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.2L Diesel
entries.history: Introduced in P12 Primera, this 2.2L common-rail diesel became the mainstream choice for UK fleet and private buyers seeking economy.
compatibleVariants: 2.2 dCi Visia, 2.2 dCi Acenta, 2.2 dCi Tekna, 2.2 dCi Sport
commonFailures: EGR valve clogging causing black smoke and power loss (60k-100k miles)
Turbo oil seal failure leading to excessive oil consumption
Injector leak-off causing hard starting and rough idle
entries.cta: Get quotes for YD22DDT Nissan Primera engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Later P11B Primera adopted this Renault-sourced 2.0 dCi for improved refinement and Euro 4/5 compliance.
compatibleVariants: 2.0 dCi Acenta, 2.0 dCi Tekna, 2.0 dCi Sport (V36/V37 chassis)
commonFailures: EGR cooler cracking causing coolant loss and white smoke (70k+ miles)
DPF regeneration issues on short-journey vehicles
Timing chain tensioner wear on high-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for M9R Nissan Primera engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Early P11 Primera diesel option, indirect injection design known for durability but modest performance.
commonFailures: Turbocharger oil seal failure causing blue smoke
Injector pump wear affecting cold starting
Head gasket failure on overheated units
entries.cta: Get quotes for CD20T Nissan Primera engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: The legendary SR20DE powered the cult P11 Primera and eGT models, earning BTCC fame and enthusiast loyalty for its balance and tunability.
commonFailures: Head gasket failure on high-mileage units (80k+ miles) - OEM 13200-76F00
Timing chain tensioner wear causing rattles and P0011/P0340 codes
Oil leaks from camshaft seals and valve cover gasket
entries.cta: Get quotes for SR20DE Nissan Primera engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Petrol
entries.history: P12 Primera's mainstream petrol engine, featuring variable valve timing and improved emissions but prone to timing chain issues.
commonFailures: Timing chain stretch causing poor acceleration and erratic RPM (60k-90k miles)
Fault codes P0011, P0335, P0340 from cam/crank sync issues
VVT solenoid failure affecting idle quality
entries.cta: Get quotes for QR20DE Nissan Primera engine replacement

entries.title: 2.5L Petrol
entries.history: Rare UK-spec P12 Primera engine offering more power for the larger saloon/estate variants.
compatibleVariants: 2.5 SE, 2.5 SLX (P12 chassis, limited UK availability)
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear similar to QR20DE
Oil consumption on high-mileage examples
VVT system faults affecting performance
entries.cta: Get quotes for QR25DD Nissan Primera engine replacement

entries.title: 1.8L Petrol
entries.history: Early P10 Primera engine, timing belt driven interference design requiring strict maintenance intervals.
commonFailures: Timing belt failure causing catastrophic valve damage if not replaced (60k miles)
Distributor cap and rotor wear affecting ignition
Oil leaks from cam seals and front crank seal
entries.cta: Get quotes for CA18DE Nissan Primera engine replacement

entries.title: 1.6L Petrol
entries.history: Entry-level P10 Primera engine, simple and economical but less common in replacement searches.
commonFailures: Timing belt wear requiring preventative replacement
Carburettor/fuel injection issues on early models
General wear items on high-mileage examples
entries.cta: Get quotes for GA16DS Nissan Primera engine replacement

entries.title: 3.5L V6 Petrol
entries.history: Rare UK-spec P12 Primera flagship engine, sharing architecture with Nissan's performance models.
compatibleVariants: 3.5 V6 GT (P12 chassis, very limited UK availability)
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear causing rattles and codes
Oil consumption on high-mileage units
Coolant crossover pipe leaks
entries.cta: Get quotes for VQ35DE Nissan Primera engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Nissan Primera Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense

problems.h4: SR20DE Head Gasket Failure - Why P11 Primera Engines Overheat
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Primera 2.0 GT, 2.0 eGT, 2.0 SLX (1995-2001, SR20DE)
problems.rootCause: High-mileage SR20DE units develop head gasket weakness due to thermal cycling and coolant degradation, leading to compression loss and overheating.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove cylinder head, replace gasket (OEM 13200-76F00), machine check, reassemble
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if block/head undamaged; risk of recurrence if underlying cause not addressed

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt SR20DE with new head gasket, timing components, bench-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for high-mileage units; addresses root cause with upgraded components

problems.recommendation: On a P11 Primera valued £1,000-£3,000, a head gasket repair may be cost-effective if the engine is otherwise sound and under 90k miles. For higher mileage or if overheating has caused damage, a rebuilt SR20DE with warranty offers better long-term value and peace of mind.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt SR20DE engine prices for your Nissan Primera

problems.h4: QR20DE Timing Chain Stretch - P12 Primera Poor Acceleration
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Primera 2.0 Visia, Acenta, Tekna (2001-2008, QR20DE)
problems.rootCause: QR20DE timing chain tensioners wear prematurely, allowing chain stretch that disrupts cam/crank synchronization, triggering fault codes and performance loss.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing chain, tensioners, guides; reset timing; clear fault codes
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses symptoms but may not prevent recurrence if VVT components are worn

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt QR20DE with upgraded tensioners, new chain, VVT components checked, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for engines over 70k miles or with multiple fault codes; eliminates recurrence risk

problems.recommendation: If your P12 Primera shows P0011/P0340 codes with rattling noise but still runs, a chain replacement may suffice. However, if acceleration is severely affected or the engine has exceeded 80k miles, a rebuilt QR20DE with upgraded components is the more reliable long-term solution.
problems.cta: Get quotes for QR20DE Nissan Primera engine replacement

problems.h4: YD22DDT EGR Valve Clogging - P12 Diesel Black Smoke
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Primera 2.2 dCi Visia, Acenta, Tekna (2001-2007, YD22DDT)
problems.rootCause: Exhaust gas recirculation valve accumulates carbon deposits, restricting flow and causing black smoke, power loss, and failed emissions tests.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean or replace EGR valve (OEM 14400-76F00); reset ECU adaptations
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; clogging likely to recur without addressing driving patterns or DPF health

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt YD22DDT with updated EGR components, turbo checked, injectors tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for high-mileage diesels or if EGR issues coincide with turbo/injector wear

problems.recommendation: For early-stage EGR clogging with otherwise healthy engine, cleaning or valve replacement is cost-effective. If black smoke persists, power is significantly reduced, or the engine has exceeded 90k miles, a rebuilt YD22DDT with updated EGR system offers better reliability and warranty protection.
problems.cta: Compare YD22DDT diesel engine prices for your Nissan Primera

problems.h4: M9R EGR Cooler Cracking - P11B Diesel Coolant Loss
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Primera 2.0 dCi Acenta, Tekna (2007-2013, M9R)
problems.rootCause: M9R EGR cooler develops cracks due to thermal stress, allowing coolant to enter exhaust system, causing white smoke, coolant loss, and potential engine damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace cracked EGR cooler (OEM 14400-76F00), flush cooling system, pressure test
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses immediate leak but doesn't prevent future cooler failure or related DPF issues

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt M9R with updated cooler design, DPF inspected, turbo checked, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best choice for high-mileage P11B diesels or if coolant loss has caused overheating damage

problems.recommendation: If coolant loss is detected early with no overheating history, EGR cooler replacement may suffice. However, given the M9R's complexity and the cost of collateral damage from coolant loss, a rebuilt engine with warranty is often the smarter investment for P11B Primera owners.
problems.cta: Get quotes for M9R Nissan Primera engine replacement

problems.h4: CA18DE Timing Belt Failure - P10 Primera Catastrophic Risk
problems.affectedModels: Nissan Primera 1.8 GS, SE, SLX (1990-1995, CA18DE)
problems.rootCause: CA18DE uses an interference timing belt; if not replaced at recommended intervals, belt failure causes piston-to-valve contact, bending valves and potentially destroying the engine.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing belt, tensioner, idlers, water pump; set timing marks correctly
repairOptions.longevity: Essential maintenance; prevents catastrophic failure if done before belt wear limit

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt CA18DE after belt failure damage; new valves, guides, gaskets, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if belt has snapped; rebuilt unit includes preventative maintenance items

problems.recommendation: If your P10 Primera's timing belt history is unknown or overdue, replace the belt kit immediately - it's far cheaper than engine replacement. If the belt has already failed, a rebuilt CA18DE is the only viable path forward, and ensures all wear items are addressed simultaneously.
problems.cta: Compare CA18DE engine prices for your Nissan Primera

problems.h4: VQ35DE Timing Chain Tensioner - P12 V6 Rattle & Codes
problems.rootCause: VQ35DE timing chain tensioners lose hydraulic pressure with age, allowing chain slack that causes rattling noise, timing errors, and fault codes.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace timing chains, tensioners, guides; reset timing; clear codes
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses immediate noise but may not prevent recurrence if VVT components are worn

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt VQ35DE with upgraded tensioners, new chains, VVT system checked, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for high-mileage V6 units or if chain noise coincides with performance issues

problems.recommendation: Given the VQ35DE's complexity and the labour-intensive nature of chain replacement, a rebuilt engine often represents better value for P12 Primera V6 owners, especially if the vehicle has exceeded 80k miles or shows multiple related symptoms.
problems.cta: Get quotes for VQ35DE Nissan Primera engine replacement

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Nissan Primera
finalCta.paragraph: Whether you're facing SR20DE head gasket issues, QR20DE timing chain stretch, or diesel EGR problems, EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Nissan Primera specialists. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare prices and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Nissan Primera Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Nissan Primera and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineTypes.h2: Nissan Primera Engine Types - Options, Costs & What to Expect
engineTypes.intro: Every Nissan Primera engine type is available through our UK network with typical price ranges based on variant, engine code and budget.

types.title: Nissan Primera Reconditioned Engines (Recon)
types.description: Professionally rebuilt with new gaskets, seals and wear items; bench-tested before dispatch.
types.frontDescription: Professionally rebuilt with new gaskets, seals and wear items; bench-tested before dispatch.
types.frontDisclaimer: Prices vary by engine code and supplier.
types.backDescription: Reconditioned Primera engines undergo partial disassembly to replace high-wear components like gaskets, seals and bearings. Ideal for engines with known failure points like SR20DE head gaskets.
backBullets: Includes new head gasket for SR20DE units
Timing components replaced on QR series engines
types.cta: Compare reconditioned Nissan Primera engine prices

types.title: Nissan Primera Rebuilt Engines
types.description: Comprehensive rebuild with upgraded components addressing known Primera failure patterns.
types.frontDescription: Comprehensive rebuild with upgraded components addressing known Primera failure patterns.

Updated EGR components for YD22DDT/M9R diesels

types.title: Nissan Primera Used Engines

3-6 month warranty typical; inspect before fitting

types.title: Nissan Primera Remanufactured Engines

types.frontDisclaimer: Premium option; lead times may apply.
types.backDescription: Remanufactured Primera engines are stripped to bare block, machined to factory specs, and assembled with new or reconditioned components. Best for high-value or enthusiast Primera models.
types.cta: Compare remanufactured Nissan Primera engine costs

types.title: Nissan Primera Refurbished Engines
types.description: Cosmetic and minor mechanical refresh; suitable for low-mileage, well-maintained units.

types.frontDisclaimer: Not suitable for engines with major failures.
types.backDescription: Refurbished Primera engines receive external cleaning, new seals, and minor component replacement. Best for engines with minor leaks or cosmetic issues but solid internal condition.

engineSizes.h2: Nissan Primera Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Nissan Primera across UK generations is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure points to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Nissan Primera 2.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.0L diesel option appeared in early P11 Primera models with the CD20T engine, later replaced by the more refined M9R dCi in P11B variants. These engines prioritised fuel economy for fleet and private buyers, though EGR and turbo issues are common on high-mileage examples.
commonFailurePoints: CD20T turbo seal failure; M9R EGR cooler cracking
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Primera 2.0L diesel engines

items.title: Nissan Primera 2.2L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.2L YD22DDT became the mainstream diesel choice for P12 Primera, offering a balance of torque and economy. However, EGR valve clogging and turbo wear are well-documented issues driving replacement enquiries.
commonFailurePoints: EGR valve clogging causing black smoke; turbo oil seal failure; injector leak-off
items.cta: Get quotes for Nissan Primera 2.2L diesel engines

items.title: Nissan Primera 1.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: The entry-level 1.6L GA16DS powered base P10 Primera models. Simple and economical but less common in replacement searches; timing belt maintenance is critical to avoid catastrophic failure.
commonFailurePoints: Timing belt failure if not replaced at 60k miles; distributor wear on early models
items.cta: Compare Nissan Primera 1.6L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Primera 1.8L Petrol Engines
items.description: The CA18DE 1.8L petrol was a popular P10 Primera engine, offering good performance but requiring strict timing belt maintenance as an interference design.
commonFailurePoints: Timing belt failure causing bent valves; oil leaks from cam seals
items.cta: Compare Nissan Primera 1.8L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Primera 2.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The iconic SR20DE dominated P11 Primera petrol models, while the QR20DE succeeded it in P12. Both are high-demand replacement engines, with SR20DE head gasket and QR20DE timing chain issues being primary failure drivers.
commonFailurePoints: SR20DE head gasket failure; QR20DE timing chain stretch causing P0011/P0340 codes
items.cta: Compare Nissan Primera 2.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Primera 2.5L Petrol Engines
items.description: The QR25DD 2.5L petrol was a rare UK-spec P12 Primera engine, offering more power for larger variants but sharing the QR family's timing chain vulnerability.
commonFailurePoints: Timing chain tensioner wear; VVT solenoid faults; oil consumption on high mileage
items.cta: Compare Nissan Primera 2.5L petrol engine prices

items.title: Nissan Primera 3.5L Petrol Engines
items.description: The VQ35DE 3.5L V6 was the flagship P12 Primera engine, rare in the UK but sought after by enthusiasts. Timing chain tensioner issues mirror other VQ applications. Not sure which engine size your Nissan Primera needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. engineYears.h2: Nissan Primera Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Nissan Primera's UK production run, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from specialists.

years.description: The original P10 Primera introduced Nissan's front-wheel-drive saloon/estate to Europe, with CA/GA/SR petrol engines and no diesel option initially.
keyChanges: P10 chassis launched with 1.6L GA16DS and 1.8L CA18DE petrol engines
1992: SR20DE 2.0L introduced in eGT model, earning BTCC success
Timing belt driven CA18DE requires strict 60k mile replacement intervals
knownFor: CA18DE timing belt critical - interference engine risk
SR20DE eGT cult status among enthusiasts
Simple, robust mechanicals but age-related wear now common
Early models lack OBD-II diagnostics
years.cta: Get quotes for 1990-1995 Nissan Primera replacement engines
years.ticker: P10 Primera engine replacement • CA18DE timing belt failure • SR20DE head gasket P10

years.description: The P11 Primera refined the formula with SR20DE as the dominant petrol engine and introduction of CD20T diesel option.
keyChanges: SR20DE became standard 2.0L petrol across most P11 trims
1996: CD20T 2.0L turbodiesel introduced for fleet buyers
Improved interior quality and chassis tuning over P10
knownFor: SR20DE head gasket failure emerges as #1 replacement driver (80k+ miles)
CD20T turbo seal issues on high-mileage examples
P11 retains enthusiast appeal; parts availability generally good
OBD-II diagnostics standard from 1996 onwards
years.cta: Compare P11 Nissan Primera engine prices
years.ticker: P11 Primera SR20DE replacement • Primera head gasket failure • CD20T turbo repair

years.description: All-new P12 platform introduced QR series petrol and YD22DDT diesel engines, with timing chain replacing belt on petrol units.
keyChanges: QR20DE 2.0L petrol replaced SR20DE, featuring VVT and timing chain
YD22DDT 2.2L dCi diesel became mainstream diesel option
2005 facelift added QR25DD 2.5L petrol and VQ35DE 3.5L V6 (rare UK)
mainEngines: VQ35DE - 3.5L V6 petrol (3.5 GT, very rare UK)
knownFor: QR20DE timing chain stretch causing P0011/P0340 codes (60k-90k miles)
YD22DDT EGR valve clogging driving black smoke complaints
VQ35DE rarity makes parts/pricing challenging for UK owners
P12 interior quality mixed; electrical gremlins reported
years.cta: Get quotes for 2001-2007 Nissan Primera replacement engines
years.ticker: P12 Primera QR20DE timing chain • YD22DDT EGR failure • Primera P0011 code fix

years.description: Final Primera iteration adopted Renault-sourced M9R 2.0L dCi diesel for improved emissions and refinement, marking end of UK Primera production.
keyChanges: M9R 2.0L dCi replaced YD22DDT, featuring updated EGR and DPF systems
V36/V37 chassis codes for saloon/estate variants
2013: Production ended; no direct Primera successor in UK
knownFor: M9R EGR cooler cracking causing coolant loss (80k+ miles)
DPF regeneration issues on short-journey P11B vehicles
Final Primera models command premium among enthusiasts
Parts availability declining but still supported via Nissan network
years.cta: Compare final generation Nissan Primera engine prices
years.ticker: P11B Primera M9R engine • Primera EGR cooler failure • Last Primera engine replacement

faq.h2: Nissan Primera Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: Is it worth replacing a Nissan Primera engine?
items.answer: Yes, for clean P11/P12 examples and eGT models. Primera values range £1,000-£5,000+, while rebuilt engines start from £1,800 for SR20DE, making replacement cost-effective versus buying another used car.
keyPoints: Rebuilt SR20DE from £1,800 vs car value £1,500-£4,000
P11 eGT and clean P12 models retain enthusiast value
12-month warranty on rebuilt units adds peace of mind
Supply & fit packages minimise downtime for daily drivers
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Nissan Primera engine prices for your variant

items.question: How much does a Nissan Primera engine replacement cost?
items.answer: UK rebuilt engine prices: SR20DE £1,800-£2,200, QR20DE £1,600-£2,000, YD22DDT £2,200-£2,700. Used engines start lower (£695-£1,500) but carry higher risk of shared failure patterns.
keyPoints: SR20DE rebuilt: £1,800-£2,200 supply only
QR20DE rebuilt: £1,600-£2,000 with upgraded tensioners
Diesel YD22DDT/M9R: £2,200-£3,000 rebuilt
Labour for fitting typically £300-£600 additional
items.cta: Get a Nissan Primera engine replacement quote today

items.question: What are the most common Nissan Primera engine problems?
items.answer: SR20DE head gasket failure (P11), QR20DE timing chain stretch (P12), and diesel EGR issues (YD22DDT/M9R) dominate replacement enquiries. Fault codes P0011/P0340 often indicate timing chain problems.
keyPoints: SR20DE: head gasket failure at 80k+ miles, OEM 13200-76F00
QR20DE: timing chain stretch causing poor acceleration, erratic RPM
YD22DDT/M9R: EGR valve/cooler clogging causing black/white smoke
CA18DE: timing belt critical - snap causes bent valves
items.cta: Compare Nissan Primera engine prices for your specific problem

items.question: Does the Nissan Primera have a timing belt or chain?
items.answer: Depends on generation: P10 CA18DE uses a timing belt (interference engine), while P11 SR20DE and P12 QR series use timing chains. Chain tensioner failure is common on QR/SR engines.
keyPoints: CA18DE (P10): timing belt, replace every 60k miles
SR20DE (P11): timing chain, tensioner wear common
QR20DE/QR25DD (P12): timing chain, stretch causes P0011/P0340
Always verify engine code before ordering replacement parts
items.cta: Check Nissan Primera timing component prices by engine code

items.question: What does fault code P0011 mean on a Nissan Primera?
items.answer: P0011 indicates camshaft timing over-advanced, usually caused by timing chain stretch or tensioner failure on QR20DE/SR20DE engines. Often misdiagnosed as sensor failure; check chain before replacing sensors.
keyPoints: P0011: Camshaft Position 'A' Timing Over-Advanced
Common on QR20DE with worn chain/tensioner (60k-90k miles)
May accompany P0335/P0340 crank/cam sync codes
Replacement engine with upgraded tensioners recommended for high-mileage units
items.cta: Get quotes for QR20DE Nissan Primera engine replacement

items.question: Which Nissan Primera engine is most reliable?
items.answer: The CD20T diesel (P11) and well-maintained SR20DE petrol (P11) have strong reliability reputations. Avoid high-mileage QR20DE without timing chain history, and check EGR health on YD22DDT/M9R diesels.
keyPoints: CD20T: robust indirect injection, simple design
SR20DE: reliable if head gasket replaced/prevented
QR20DE: reliable if timing chain/tensioners addressed
Always request service history and compression test for used engines
items.cta: Compare reliable Nissan Primera engine options by code

items.question: Can I swap a different engine into my Nissan Primera?
items.answer: Engine swaps are complex due to ECU, wiring, and mounting differences between P10/P11/P12 generations. SR20DE to QR20DE swaps require significant modification; stick to original engine code for straightforward replacement.
keyPoints: P10/P11/P12 use different engine families (CA/SR vs QR/YD)
ECU compatibility critical for OBD-II models (1996+)
Mounting points, wiring looms differ between generations
Specialist advice recommended before attempting non-standard swap
items.cta: Find Nissan Primera engine compatibility quotes by variant

items.question: How long does a Nissan Primera engine replacement take?
items.answer: Petrol SR20DE/QR20DE replacements typically take 1-2 days for supply & fit. Diesel YD22DDT/M9R models are more complex, allowing 2-3 days. Mobile fitting available nationwide for P10/P11/P12 chassis.
keyPoints: Petrol engines: 1-2 days typical for fitted replacement
Diesel models: 2-3 days due to EGR/DPF complexity
Mobile fitting available; confirm location with supplier
Post-fit road test and warranty activation included
items.cta: Book Nissan Primera engine supply & fit with UK specialists

items.question: Do Nissan Primera replacement engines come with warranty?
items.answer: Yes - rebuilt/reconditioned engines include minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering head gasket, timing components, and EGR parts. Used engines typically carry 3-6 month limited warranty.
keyPoints: Rebuilt SR20DE: 12-month warranty on head gasket, timing chain
QR20DE rebuilt: warranty covers upgraded tensioners, VVT components
Diesel rebuilt: EGR valve/cooler covered under warranty
Always confirm exact terms with chosen supplier before purchase
items.cta: Compare Nissan Primera engine warranty terms from UK suppliers
